label: create_icon
peekOfCode:
def create_icon(size):
    # Green background
    img = Image.new('RGB', (size, size), color='#0f4c1e')
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
    # Circle
    margin = size // 10
    draw.ellipse(
        [margin, margin, size-margin, size-margin],
        fill='#2ecc71'
    )
